description: Core deterministic seed expansion model. A 40-bit seed encodes 6 proportional amplitudes across octahedral vertices. Expansion preserves structure exactly — the trunk of the tree.

seed_format.encoding: Each vertex gets 6 bits (0-63). The 6 vertices map to octahedral axes: +X, -X, +Y, -Y, +Z, -Z.
seed_format.rosetta_link: The 6 octahedral vertices ARE the same geometry as SHAPE.OCTA faces. The seed IS an octahedral state.

expansion_equation.description: Each amplitude scales proportionally to maintain its fraction of total energy. Structure is preserved exactly.
properties: Deterministic — same seed always produces same expansion
Energy-conserving — sum(S_i) = E_total at every shell

shell_model.description: Seeds expand in concentric shells from inner to outer. Each shell inherits structure from its parent.
shell_model.causality: Inner shells determine outer shells, never the reverse
shell_model.rosetta_link: Causality constraint maps to TAF.AXIOM.3 (arrow of time) and PRINCIPLE.P04 (Causality)
shell_model.shape_analogy: Like Platonic solids nested inside each other — the inner shape constrains what the outer shape can be
